meta.description: A brutalist and highly structured e-commerce aesthetic for men's grooming products. It relies heavily on strict grid layouts, sharp borders, bold monochromatic typography, and stark contrasts to convey a masculine, premium, and functional brand identity.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Strict top border separating it from the announcement bar and a bottom border separating it from content. Logo on left, nav links center, icons right.

footer.description: Information about accessibility and contact details.
footer.notes: Three-column layout separated by strict vertical borders. Contains accessibility info, brand links, and community links. Bottom section has social icons, a country selector, and copyright info.

productCard.notes: Products are displayed in a strict grid with no spacing between the cells. The cells have a distinct greenish-grey background color. No visible text or buttons over the product images themselves in the grid view shown.

productGrid.notes: A strict 3x3 grid with borders between every item and a greenish-grey background for the images.

featuredProducts.heading: FRAGRANCES
featuredProducts.notes: Section features a large lifestyle/texture image on top, followed by specific fragrance details with horizontal and vertical border divisions.

sections.name: announcement-bar
sections.notes: Sticky or fixed at the very top of the page.

sections.name: hero-statement

design.styling: Top and bottom borders. The statement has a black background with white italicized serif text, highlighting the words.

content.headline: Bold brand statement
content.specialElements: Text has a highlight effect (white text on black blocks).

sections.notes: Very stark and impactful typographical section.

sections.name: product-grid-section

design.styling: Strict grid with 1px black borders separating every cell. Top header bar spanning the grid.

content.headline: Section title in wide, bold sans-serif

media.description: 3x3 grid of distinct product bottles and tins against a greenish-grey background.

sections.notes: The grid is a dominant visual element, creating a catalog-like feel.

sections.name: fragrances-carousel
sections.layout: Full width with internal divisions. Top image, below split into text and lists.

design.styling: Heavy use of horizontal and vertical borders to segment information.

content.headline: Large category title
content.body: Descriptive paragraph about the specific fragrance.

media.description: Dark, moody texture image (looks like waves or clouds) spanning horizontally.

content.specialElements: Divided grid below the main description detailing 'Primary Notes', 'Fragrance Family', and 'Fragrance Type'.

sections.notes: Looks like a horizontal scroll or carousel given the partial view of the next item on the right.

sections.name: values-imagery
sections.layout: Full width header, 3-column image grid below

design.styling: Massive header text, images separated by borders.

media.description: Three portraits of men showcasing grooming styles.

sections.notes: The headline is so large it's intentionally cropped/cut off on the edges.

sections.name: blog-newsletter
sections.layout: Full width header, centered input below

content.headline: Large, wide sans-serif call to action text
content.cta: Input field with a black square button containing a white arrow. 0rem border radius.
content.specialElements: Input and button are styled together with sharp corners.
